name: Transamerican Freight Lines, Inc. v. Brada Miller Freight Systems, Inc.
question: Do the “control-and-responsibility” provisions of the Interstate Commerce Commission’s regulations on equipment leasing prohibit an agreement between carriers in which the lessor indemnifies the lessee for a loss caused by the negligence of the lessor?
description: a case in which the Court held that the indemnification provision did not contravene ICC regulations designed to prevent motor carriers from sharing operating authority in order to evade safety requirements and limit each carrier’s liability to the public
